assertions.assertion: Uses JsonWebTokenHandler.ReadJsonWebToken (or JwtSecurityTokenHandler) to parse the access token string
assertions.rationale: Uses JwtSecurityTokenHandler.ReadJwtToken(tokenResponse.AccessToken) to parse the JWT, which is an acceptable equivalent per the assertion.

assertions.assertion: Asserts the client_id claim matches the test client's ID
assertions.rationale: Asserts Assert.Equal("test.service", clientId) after extracting the client_id claim from the parsed JWT.

assertions.assertion: Asserts the scope claim contains the expected scope value
assertions.rationale: Asserts Assert.Equal("api1", scope) after extracting the scope claim.

assertions.assertion: Asserts the issuer (iss) claim matches the expected authority URL
assertions.rationale: Asserts Assert.Equal("https://localhost", jwt.Issuer) to verify the issuer.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT make a network call to validate the token — parses it locally
assertions.rationale: Uses ReadJwtToken which only parses the JWT string locally without any network validation calls.
